zh.lifeSummary: Alice Saville於1431年出生在英國越可爾。她於1457年與Sir William Calverley II在英國越可爾卡爾福利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年9月10日在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年91歲，埋葬在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Saville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

variants.name: Savel
meanings: Slovak and Czech (Šavel): from the Biblical personal name Šavel, Hebrew Shaul (see Saul ). It may be a nickname for a godless person, from the archaic word šavel, which is derived from the Biblical name.

Slovenian (Šavel): probably from an old spelling of the Biblical personal name Savel (see Saul , compare 2 above). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname or a topographic name from an old vernacular spelling of the same plant name as in 4 below.
Americanized form of Slovenian Šavelj: probably a nickname or a topographic name from the plant name š(č)avelj ‘sorrel (Rumex acetosa)’.

variants.name: Savelle
meanings: English: variant of   Saville  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Saffell
meanings: English (Essex): from the Middle English personal name Safugel (Old Norse sǽfogl ‘sea-bird, especially the cormorant’), not recorded as a personal name in Scandinavia, but common in England after the Norman Conquest. In some cases with voicing of intervocalic /f/ to /v/, there may have been confusion with Saville .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Saville was born in 1431, in Yorkshire, England. She married Sir William Calverley II in 1457, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 September 1522, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1522, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Savilleは1431年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1457年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーでSir William Calverley IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年9月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで91歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Saville(은)는 1431년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 Sir William Calverley II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 9월 10일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Saville родилась в 1431 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Calverley II в 1457 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1522 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.
